name: bouten_forward_interior

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.2+§7.5 + reference impl #333] A 傍点 forward reference whose target 青空 occurs earlier in the same plain run but is NOT byte-adjacent to the bracket (の下を歩く intervenes). Per §7.5 the most-recent plain occurrence is styled in place: the parser splices a detached bouten decoration at [0,6) while the directive bracket stays a forward reference that renders nothing. 青空 appears exactly once, now bouten-marked; serialize reproduces the source byte-for-byte. Offsets from the §3 byte model.

source: 青空の下を歩く［＃「青空」に傍点］

expected.html: 青空の下を歩く
expected.serialize: 青空の下を歩く［＃「青空」に傍点］
